_comment: Configure your application form fields here. Each field gets a dedicated editor with word counter, guidance callout, and status tracking. Edit this file — no code changes needed.

why_interested.label: Why are you interested in this program?
why_interested.guidance: Explain your motivation. Connect your background to the program goals. Show you understand what it offers and why you specifically belong here.
why_interested.reviewer_wants: Authentic motivation, specific connection to the field, evidence you understand the domain.

relevant_background.label: Describe your relevant background.
relevant_background.guidance: Summarize your hands-on experience relevant to this role. Be specific about what you built, researched, or discovered.
relevant_background.reviewer_wants: Concrete evidence of relevant work, technical depth, demonstrated capability.

excited_area.label: What area are you most excited about?
excited_area.guidance: Name a specific area and explain why it excites you. Reference concrete work or papers if possible.
excited_area.reviewer_wants: Technical specificity, genuine enthusiasm, awareness of current frontiers.

code_samples.label: Describe your code samples and what they demonstrate.
code_samples.guidance: List 2-3 code samples. For each, explain what it does and what skill it demonstrates.
code_samples.reviewer_wants: Clear descriptions, relevance to the role, code quality awareness.

commitment.label: What is your availability and commitment level?
commitment.guidance: Be transparent about your availability. Disclose any other obligations.
commitment.reviewer_wants: Transparency, ability to commit sufficient time.

anything_else.label: Anything else you want us to know?
anything_else.guidance: Use this for anything that doesn't fit elsewhere. Unique perspectives, unconventional background, additional context.
anything_else.reviewer_wants: Memorable differentiators, authenticity, things that make you stand out.

what_to_hit: Personal journey that led you here
A specific turning point or moment
The gap you want to fill
tips: Lead with a specific moment, not abstract motivation
Name the gap you want to fill

what_to_hit: Technical depth in the relevant domain
One specific area (go deep, not wide)
Why this area matters to you personally
What you would work on first
tips: Pick ONE area and go deep
Reference a specific paper or finding

what_to_hit: What each sample demonstrates (not just what it does)
tips: Describe what each sample DEMONSTRATES, not just what it does

what_to_hit: Anything the form didn't ask about
tips: This is your wildcard — use it for what makes you unique
